# Due Diligence Best Practices: What Leading Pharmaceutical Companies Look for in Biosafety Equipment Suppliers

## 适用受众
CEO

## 写作角度说明
头部药企的供应商评估标准代表行业最高要求。本角度总结领先企业的供应商尽调实践，帮助 CEO 建立系统化的供应商评估方法论。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Leading pharmaceutical companies apply rigorous multi-dimensional due diligence—financial health, technical capability, quality systems, sustainability—because equipment supplier failure has catastrophic consequences that far exceed the procurement savings.

## 参考素材
- Financial due diligence: audited financial statements, credit ratings, insurance coverage
- Technical capability assessment: factory audits, witnessed testing, sample validation
- Quality system evaluation: ISO certification, CAPA systems, complaint handling processes
- Sustainability assessment: environmental compliance, energy efficiency, waste management
- Social responsibility: labor practices, occupational health, community engagement
- Reference checks: peer company interviews, historical performance data, contract dispute resolution

## 关键词
Due Diligence, Best Practices, Supplier Assessment, Pharmaceutical Standards, Quality Systems, Risk Management
